name: What History Says with Simon Rieber
original_name: What History Says with Simon Rieber
overview: Hosted by Simon Rieber a Swahili show discusses matters shook the world, history and were not told in more details, past fantasies, politics, science, also hints little facts about the spiritual world. The show premiered the late 2021 distributed by SR Media Services.
